What We Offer

Comprehensive Medical Transportation Services

Tailored transportation solutions for every medical need, delivered with care and professionalism.

Ambulatory Transportation

Safe, comfortable transport for patients who can walk independently or with minimal assistance to and from medical appointments.

Wheelchair Transportation

Fully equipped wheelchair-accessible vehicles with trained attendants ensuring safe, dignified transport for mobility-impaired patients.

Hospital Discharge Transportation

Reliable and prompt transportation ensuring patients get home safely and comfortably following inpatient hospital stays.

Dialysis Transportation

Consistent, scheduled transportation for dialysis patients requiring frequent trips to treatment centers, three times a week or more.

Rehabilitation Transportation

Supportive transport for patients attending physical therapy, occupational therapy, and rehabilitation programs on a regular basis.

Senior Transportation

Compassionate, patient transportation services designed specifically for elderly patients requiring extra time and care during travel.

Why Choose ODES

Your Safety and Comfort Is Our Priority

We go above and beyond to ensure every patient receives exceptional care from pickup to drop-off.

Safety First

Every ride is conducted with the highest safety standards. Our vehicles undergo rigorous maintenance, and our drivers are thoroughly trained in passenger safety.

Professional Drivers

Our drivers are carefully selected, background-checked, and trained to assist patients with respect and compassion. They understand the sensitivity of medical transportation.

Reliable Scheduling

We understand that medical appointments cannot be missed. Our scheduling system ensures you are picked up on time, every time, without fail.

Comfortable Vehicles

Our modern fleet is equipped with climate control, comfortable seating, and all necessary accessibility equipment to make every journey as comfortable as possible.

On-Time Service

Punctuality is at the core of what we do. We track appointments and plan routes in advance to ensure timely arrivals for every single ride.

Patient-Focused Care

Every decision we make is centered on patient well-being. From driver training to vehicle selection, the patient's comfort and dignity always come first.

Our Story

Built on a Foundation of Compassion and Reliability

ODES Medical Transportation was founded with a clear purpose: to eliminate the barriers that prevent patients from accessing the medical care they need. We recognized that unreliable transportation is one of the leading causes of missed appointments and deteriorating health outcomes.

Under the leadership of Eugene Nkem Odega, ODES has grown into a trusted transportation partner for patients throughout Gardena and the greater Los Angeles area, providing safe, dignified, and dependable rides to those who need them most.

Patient Stories

What Our Riders Say

Real experiences from real patients who trust ODES Medical Transportation.

"I have been using ODES for my dialysis appointments three times a week for over a year. They are always on time, always professional, and the drivers genuinely care about my well-being. I could not manage without them."

Dialysis Patient, Compton
"After my hip replacement surgery, getting home from the hospital safely was my biggest concern. ODES arranged everything perfectly. The driver was gentle, patient, and helped me every step of the way. Truly exceptional service."
JT
James T.
Post-Surgery Patient, Torrance
"My mother is 84 years old and uses a wheelchair. Finding someone we could trust to transport her safely was a challenge until we found ODES. The peace of mind we have knowing she is in good hands is priceless."

Family Caregiver, Hawthorne

Our Story

About ODES Medical Transportation

A patient-centered transportation company built on compassion, reliability, and a deep commitment to community care.

Our History

Transportation Built Around the Patient

ODES Medical Transportation was established with a singular mission: to provide reliable, dignified, and compassionate non-emergency medical transportation to patients throughout the greater Los Angeles area. We recognized a critical gap in healthcare access — many patients miss vital appointments simply because they have no safe way to get there.

From our first ride, we committed to doing things differently. We invested in properly equipped vehicles, hired and trained compassionate drivers, and built scheduling systems that put patient needs first. Every process, policy, and practice at ODES is designed with one question in mind: what does the patient need?

Today, ODES serves thousands of patients from our base in Gardena, California, providing wheelchair-accessible transport, dialysis transportation, hospital discharge rides, and much more across the region.

Leadership

Meet Our Owner

Eugene Nkem Odega
Founder and Owner, ODES Medical Transportation

Eugene Nkem Odega founded ODES Medical Transportation with a vision rooted in personal conviction: that every patient, regardless of their mobility, financial situation, or circumstances, deserves safe and dependable transportation to their medical appointments.

With a background in patient care and community service, Eugene understands firsthand how critical reliable transportation is to health outcomes. He has seen too many patients miss chemotherapy sessions, dialysis appointments, and follow-up visits simply because they lacked a safe way to get there. ODES was built to change that reality.

Under Eugene's leadership, ODES has grown into a trusted name in the Gardena community and beyond. He personally oversees driver training, vehicle standards, and customer service protocols, ensuring that every rider receives the respectful, attentive care they deserve.

Eugene believes that transportation is not just a logistical service — it is an act of care. He leads ODES with that principle at the forefront, and it shows in every ride the company provides.

Our Mission

Why We Exist

To provide safe, reliable, and compassionate non-emergency medical transportation that removes barriers to healthcare access, improves health outcomes, and restores dignity and independence to every patient we serve.

Our Vision

Where We Are Headed

To be the most trusted non-emergency medical transportation provider in California — recognized not just for the reliability of our service, but for the quality of our care, the integrity of our team, and the positive impact we have on the communities we serve.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

These principles guide every decision we make and every ride we provide.

Safety

The physical safety of every passenger is our highest priority, maintained through rigorous standards and continuous training.

Respect

Every patient is treated with dignity, kindness, and the utmost respect, regardless of their condition, background, or circumstances.

Reliability

We show up when we say we will. Dependability is not a bonus — it is the foundation of everything we do at ODES.

Compassion

We understand that our riders may be going through difficult times. We approach every interaction with empathy and genuine care.

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards in every aspect of our service, from vehicle cleanliness to driver professionalism to scheduling accuracy.

What We Provide

Our Transportation Services

Comprehensive non-emergency medical transportation tailored to every patient's unique needs and medical situation.

Ambulatory Transportation

Designed for patients who are mobile but require safe, reliable transport to and from medical appointments. Our drivers provide door-to-door assistance, ensuring patients are comfortable from the moment they leave home to the moment they return. Ideal for routine doctor visits, specialist appointments, lab work, and outpatient procedures.

Wheelchair Transportation

Our wheelchair-accessible vehicles are specially outfitted with ramps, lifts, and secure tie-down systems to safely accommodate manual and power wheelchairs. Trained attendants assist with boarding and disembarking, and every ride is planned to ensure a smooth, dignified experience for passengers with mobility challenges.

Medical Appointment Transportation

Scheduled, reliable transport to any medical appointment — primary care, specialist, dental, vision, mental health, and more. We track your appointment time and plan pickup windows strategically so you never arrive late. We also coordinate return rides so you are not left waiting after your appointment concludes.

Hospital Discharge Transportation

Transitioning home from a hospital stay is a vulnerable moment. Our hospital discharge service ensures patients are transported home safely, comfortably, and without delay. We coordinate directly with hospital discharge teams to ensure seamless pickups and can accommodate patients with recent surgical procedures, IV equipment, or other special requirements.

Dialysis Transportation

Dialysis patients require transportation multiple times per week, every week, without fail. We specialize in scheduled dialysis transport, building consistent, reliable routes and times around each patient's treatment schedule. Our drivers understand the physical demands of dialysis and treat returning patients with particular gentleness and care.

Physical Therapy Transportation

Consistent attendance at physical therapy appointments is critical to recovery. We provide dependable transport to PT sessions, helping patients complete their prescribed treatment courses without disruption. Our drivers understand the importance of arriving at the right time and in the right condition to make the most of each session.

Rehabilitation Transportation

For patients recovering from strokes, traumatic injuries, or major surgeries, rehabilitation is a long, demanding journey. ODES provides reliable, patient transport to inpatient and outpatient rehabilitation centers, ensuring patients can access the intensive therapies that support their recovery — without the added stress of transportation logistics.

Senior Transportation

Elderly patients deserve transportation that is unhurried, respectful, and attentive to their individual needs. Our senior transportation service offers extra time for boarding and alighting, assistance with doors and mobility devices, and drivers trained in senior care sensitivity. We understand that for many seniors, these rides are also a social connection.

Long Distance Medical Transportation

Specialized medical facilities, cancer centers, and research hospitals often require patients to travel significant distances. Our long-distance medical transportation service extends our commitment to comfort and safety over extended journeys, with scheduled stops, climate-controlled vehicles, and attendants available for longer rides when needed.

Not Sure Which Service You Need?

Call us and we will help you identify the right transportation solution for your specific situation.

Our Purpose

Our Goal — Mobility for Every Patient

We exist to make sure no one ever misses essential medical care because they couldn't get there. Reliable. Compassionate. On time, every time.

What Drives Us

Three Goals That Guide Every Ride

From the first phone call to the safe drop-off, these promises shape how we operate, hire, and grow.

1. Reliability Patients Can Count On

We aim for 100% on-time pickups. Dialysis, chemotherapy, post-surgical follow-ups — these appointments cannot wait, and neither do we.

On-Time Promise Live GPS Tracking 24/7 Dispatch Backup Vehicles

2. Compassion at Every Step

Our drivers are trained, certified, and screened to treat each passenger with the patience and dignity their family would expect. Real care, not just a ride.

Background Checked CPR Trained Sensitivity Training Door-to-Door Help

3. Accessibility Without Barriers

Wheelchair ramps, secure tie-downs, climate-controlled cabins. We remove every obstacle between a patient and the care they need.

ADA Compliant Wheelchair Ramps 4-Point Securement Climate Control
Our Commitments

The Standards Behind Every Trip

We measure ourselves against these standards every single day. They are not optional.

Zero Missed Appointments

If a patient depends on us, we show up — period. We hold ourselves accountable to a 100% on-time goal.

Safety Without Compromise

Daily vehicle inspections, certified securement, and trained drivers. Patient safety is the only acceptable outcome.

Dignity for Every Passenger

Every patient is greeted by name, helped at the door, and treated like a member of our own family.

Transparent Pricing

No surprise fees. Clear quotes up front, insurance coordination, and itemized receipts for every trip.

Always Available

24/7 dispatch and same-day booking when life doesn't follow a schedule. We answer when you call.

Community First

We grow by serving our neighbors better, not by cutting corners. Local roots, local accountability.
